ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your recent order (Order #123-4567890-1234567) has been shipped and is on its way.

Order Summary:
• Item: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
• Quantity: 1
• Price: $99.99
• Shipping Method: Standard Shipping

Tracking Information:
• Carrier: UPS
• Tracking Number: 1Z999AA10123456784
• Estimated Delivery: 4-5 business days

If you have any questions or need assistance, please reply to this email or contact our customer support at <URL>.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. We hope you enjoy your purchase!

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended
spam.body:
Dear CryptoUser,

We regret to inform you that due to recent suspicious activity, your crypto wallet (ID: X123456789) has been temporarily suspended. To restore full access, please verify your identity immediately.

1. Please click the link below to confirm your personal details and complete the verification process:
   <URL>

2. If you do not take action within 24 hours, your wallet will be permanently disabled, and any remaining balance will be inaccessible.

We understand this may be inconvenient, but protecting your assets is our top priority. Should you have any questions, do not hesitate to reply to this email.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
CryptoSecure Support Team
